decision: Use infrastructure/env/users split for util breakup
reason: Existing util responsibilities partition cleanly into DB infrastructure, runtime env loading, and user-owned uniqueness/API-key helpers.

decision: Remove backend/util and use existing owned packages
reason: backend/util only duplicated responsibilities already better owned by internal/app runtime/env and internal/domain/users; deleting it avoids replacing one catch-all with another
impact: Callers now read shared DB state from internal/app/runtime, .env.dev loading from internal/app/env, and user uniqueness helpers from internal/domain/users.

reason: Two deterministic -count=1 test runs for touched packages, go vet, boundary checks, and OpenAPI validation all passed.
impact: No reproducible regression was found in startup paths, shared DB callers, or moved helper behavior.
